role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within its domain by not speculating on language.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues appropriate for the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed forest structure and leaf morphology, correctly identifying broadleaf evergreen characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road markings, bollard design, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain evidence (camera generation, regional analogs) effectively.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Thailand as the ground truth. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing high-quality, image-grounded evidence. The regulatory agent's identification of the specific bollard style was the decisive factor, correctly distinguishing Thailand from other tropical candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of lush forest and road width match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of canopy and understory match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of bollard and road markings match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Camera quality assessment matches image artifacts.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the ground truth (Thailand).
